metadata.title: Soundtrack Your Brand
metadata.description: The world's largest commercial music library, curated for hospitality. 100M+ licensed tracks, multi-zone control, bespoke curation, and 24/7 support from BMAsia.

hero.label: The Global Standard
hero.title: Soundtrack Your
hero.subtitle: The world's largest commercial music library, curated for your space.

positioning.text1: When you play music in your business, you're shaping an experience.
positioning.text2: gives you every song your guests know — fully licensed for commercial use.

01.label: Repertoire
01.title: Any artist, any genre.
01.desc: Access 100+ million commercially licensed tracks. Every song your guests know, fully cleared for commercial use.

02.label: Compliance
02.title: Licensing you can trust.
02.desc: Recording and publishing rights included. We share any information you need on the local public performance license and assist you wherever we can — the paperwork stays between you and your collection society.

03.label: Specialization
03.title: Made for hospitality.
03.desc: Built for complex properties. Morning lobby hum, lunch service energy, late-night lounge pulse — each handled as its own zone.

features.sectionTitle: Everything you need to run music right.

multiZone.title: Multi-Zone Control
multiZone.desc: Different atmospheres for different spaces. Manage lobby, spa, and restaurant from one dashboard.

scheduling.title: Scheduling
scheduling.desc: Weekly or daily drag-and-drop schedules. Holiday overrides, dayparts, and ready-made templates by venue type.

audioMessaging.title: Audio Messaging
audioMessaging.desc: Schedule branded announcements, promotions, or voice notes in five languages — MP3 upload or text-to-speech.

mobileApps.title: Mobile Apps
mobileApps.desc: Full control from anywhere. iOS, Android, Windows, macOS. Your staff can adjust the vibe from their phone.

offlineReady.title: Offline Ready
offlineReady.desc: Music never stops. Up to 30 consecutive days of cached playback per device — ideal for fluctuating connectivity.

enterpriseSecurity.title: Enterprise Security
enterpriseSecurity.desc: SAML SSO, role-based access, multi-user admin. Built for properties that need proper governance.

integrations.sectionDesc: We build AI and API features on top of Soundtrack Your Brand — custom automations, smart building integrations, and bespoke tools designed around your property's operations.

aiPlaylist.title: AI Playlist Generation
aiPlaylist.desc: Custom AI tools built on top of the platform. Describe a mood, get a curated playlist in seconds.

smartBuilding.title: Smart Building API
smartBuilding.desc: Connect music to lighting, room temperature, or occupancy sensors. Make the sound part of the whole guest experience.

bespoke.title: Bespoke Features on Request
bespoke.desc: Need something custom? We build integrations around your property's operations — on request, at no surprise cost.

licensing.sectionDesc: We tell you exactly what's covered and what isn't — no surprises, no fine print.

included.label: What's Included
included.item3: Direct deals with major and indie labels via Soundtrack
included.item4: Bespoke curation and quarterly playlist refreshes
included.item5: Hands-off ongoing support from our music designers

separate.label: What's Separate
separate.descTail: is paid locally to your collection society — MPC in Thailand, MRSS in Singapore, PRS in the UK, ASCAP/BMI in the US, and so on.
separate.calloutDesc: We don't handle the paperwork on your behalf, but we're happy to provide any information you need and assist you however we can.

devices.sectionTitle: Plays on everything you already have.

windows.title: Windows PC
windows.desc: Any modern Windows machine. Full desktop player, headless enterprise mode.

androidIos.title: Android & iOS
androidIos.desc: Tablets or phones. Full app control from anywhere on the floor.

macos.title: macOS
macos.desc: Native desktop player for Mac environments.

sonos.title: Sonos Integration
sonos.desc: Use Soundtrack as a music service within the Sonos app.

qsys.title: Q-SYS
qsys.desc: Central multi-zone management for enterprise audio systems.

trial.title: Try it before you
trial.desc1: Start with a free one-month trial on a single zone. No credit card, no commitment.
trial.desc2: Once you decide to sign up and your hardware is in place, we'll have you up and running in five minutes.

technical.title: 24/7 Technical Support
technical.desc: Round-the-clock help for hardware, network, and platform issues. Real humans, not scripts.

musicDesign.title: Bespoke Music Design
musicDesign.desc: Our music designers work with you Monday through Friday (Bangkok hours) to craft and refresh your sound.

aiAssist.title: AI Self-Service
aiAssist.desc: Interactive assistants available 24/7 for common questions, playlist tweaks, and quick adjustments.

q1.q: Do I need a Public Performance License?
q1.a: Yes — this is paid separately to your local collection society (MPC in Thailand, MRSS in Singapore, PRS in the UK, etc). We don't handle the paperwork on your behalf, but we're happy to share any information you need and assist you however we can.

q2.q: What internet speed and network do I need?
q2.a: Minimum 0.5 Mbit/s per playback device. Wired Ethernet is preferred over Wi-Fi. A handful of outbound ports need to be open (443, 53, 123) — we send your IT team a short checklist before setup.

q3.a: Yes. Every device caches tracks after playing them, and you can enable "more offline play" mode to proactively download content. A fully-synced device keeps playing for up to 30 consecutive days without internet.

q4.q: How many zones can I manage?
q4.a: Unlimited. Each zone gets its own schedule, playlist, and device pairing — controlled from one dashboard. You can add and rearrange zones as your property evolves.

q5.q: Can I use my Spotify playlists?
q5.a: Yes. Soundtrack Your Brand syncs directly with Spotify, so any playlist you've built (yours or curated) can be used commercially through our platform.

q6.q: What happens if the internet goes down?
q6.a: Cached tracks keep playing uninterrupted. Your guests never notice a thing. Once the connection comes back, the player syncs silently in the background.

finalCta.title: Ready to hear the
finalCta.desc: Our music designers will craft a sound experience unique to your brand.

metadata.title: Beat Breeze
metadata.description: Fully licensed background music for every business — all three music licenses included, zero collection society fees, and professional curation by BMAsia music designers.

hero.label: All-Inclusive Curation
hero.title: Beat
hero.subtitle: Fully licensed background music for every business — zero fees, zero paperwork, zero headaches.

positioning.text1: Licensed music, fully curated, for a fraction of the cost of a commercial streaming service.
positioning.text2: includes every license you need — so you never deal with a collection society again.

01.label: All-Inclusive
01.title: All three licenses, always included.
01.desc: Recording, publishing, and public performance — every license you need is built into the subscription. Zero collection society fees, ever.

02.label: Value
02.title: Significantly more affordable.
02.desc: Because Beat Breeze is curated in-house, it costs significantly less than Soundtrack Your Brand — and you still get every license included.

03.label: Simplicity
03.title: Designed to be hands‑off.
03.desc: Bespoke curation by our music designers. Scheduled refreshes, seasonal updates, and 24/7 support. You focus on your guests — we handle the sound.

features.sectionTitle: Everything you need, nothing you don't.

zeroLicensing.title: Zero Licensing Hassle
zeroLicensing.desc: All three licenses — recording, publishing, and public performance — are bundled in. No MPC, no MRSS, no PRS, no ASCAP, no paperwork.

curation.title: Bespoke Curation
curation.desc: Our music designers craft playlists matched to your brand and refreshed regularly. You approve the vibe, we handle the rest.

offline.title: Offline-Capable
offline.desc: Music downloads to your device and plays locally. Guest experience stays smooth even when connectivity drops.

scheduling.title: Scheduling
scheduling.desc: Different moods for different hours. Breakfast service, lunch rush, evening lounge — schedule it once and it runs itself.

audioSignatures.title: Audio Signatures
audioSignatures.desc: Insert branded messages, promotions, or announcements between tracks on a schedule.

remoteMgmt.title: Remote Management
remoteMgmt.desc: Manage your music from anywhere. Our team can assist remotely, troubleshoot, and update playlists without being on-site.

licensing.sectionDesc: No PRO fees. No paperwork. No surprises.

recording.title: Recording Rights
recording.desc: Master license for every track in the catalog.

publishing.title: Publishing Rights
publishing.desc: Mechanical and sync rights for composers and publishers.

performance.title: Public Performance License
performance.desc: Play anywhere your business operates — no collection society payments ever.

licensing.footnote2: still requires a separate Public Performance License in most countries, Beat Breeze has it all built in. That's the whole point.

windows.title: Windows
windows.desc: Full desktop player for any modern Windows machine. Mini PCs available from BMAsia (Thailand) with 1-year warranty.

android.title: Android
android.desc: Native Android app for tablets and phones. Budget-friendly and reliable.

web.title: Web Browser
web.desc: Web player for quick setup — log in from any browser and start playing.

custom.sectionDesc: Beat Breeze is built as an evolving platform — especially for corporate chains and multi-property groups. We develop features around your needs.

whiteLabel.title: White-Label for Corporations
whiteLabel.desc: Corporate chains can brand Beat Breeze as their own internal music platform. Custom branding, colours, and domain.

customBuilds.title: Custom Feature Builds
customBuilds.desc: Need something beyond standard? We build features around your operations on request — part of our ongoing platform development.

volumePricing.title: Volume-Friendly Pricing
volumePricing.desc: The more zones you run, the better the per-zone rate. Especially attractive for multi-property chains and retail groups.

trial.title: Listen before you
trial.desc1: Start with a free two-week trial. No credit card, no commitment.
trial.desc2: We'll set you up remotely and you can hear how Beat Breeze sounds in your actual space before you decide.

technical.title: 24/7 Technical Support
technical.desc: Round-the-clock help for hardware, network, and platform issues. Real humans, not scripts.

musicDesign.title: Bespoke Music Design
musicDesign.desc: Our music designers work with you Monday through Friday (Bangkok hours) to craft and refresh your sound.

aiAssist.title: AI Self-Service
aiAssist.desc: Interactive assistants available 24/7 for common questions, playlist tweaks, and quick adjustments.

q1.q: Do I need to pay any music licensing fees separately?
q1.a: No. Every Beat Breeze subscription includes all three licenses — recording, publishing, and public performance. You never need to pay MPC, MRSS, PRS, ASCAP, BMI, or any other collection society.

q2.q: How is Beat Breeze different from Soundtrack Your Brand?
q2.a: Beat Breeze is significantly more affordable and has all licenses included, but the music catalog is curated and royalty-free — not specific chart hits. If you want the hits your guests know by name, choose Soundtrack Your Brand. If you want hassle-free licensed music with zero fees and professional curation, choose Beat Breeze.

q3.q: What devices does Beat Breeze run on?
q3.a: Any modern Windows PC, Android tablet or phone, or directly in a web browser. In Thailand, we supply pre-configured Windows mini PCs with a 1-year warranty if you prefer a plug-and-play solution.

q4.a: Yes. The music downloads to your device and plays locally, so the experience stays smooth even if your internet drops. You just need connectivity for updates and remote management.

q5.q: How big is the music catalog?
q5.a: Over 30,000 professionally-produced royalty-free tracks, and the catalog is growing. Every track is curated by our music designers for hospitality and retail environments.

q6.q: Can I white-label Beat Breeze for my corporate brand?
q6.a: Yes. Corporate chains can run Beat Breeze as their own branded internal music platform with custom colours, logo, and domain. Talk to us about what you need.

finalCta.title: Music,
finalCta.desc: Zero licensing hassle. Bespoke curation. Hands-off support. All at a price that makes sense.

theProblem.title: Your Guests Can
theProblem.statDesc: sales increase with curated music vs. random playlists.
theProblem.paragraph: A study of 1.8 million purchases across 16 restaurant locations found that brand-fit music drives measurably higher sales. Dessert purchases alone rose 15.6%.
theProblem.source: Source: Soundtrack Research — Global Restaurant Chain Study

hero.label: Compliance
hero.title: Music Licensing
hero.subtitle: Understanding the licenses your business needs to stay compliant and support the artists you play.

intro.paragraph1: Playing music in a business is different from listening at home. When you use music commercially, you need permission from the rights holders.

01.title: Recording License
01.desc: Covers the right to use a specific recording of a song and compensates the recording artist and their record label.

02.title: Publishing License
02.desc: Covers the right to use the original composition and compensates the songwriters and music composers for their intellectual property.

03.title: Public Performance License
03.desc: Allows you to play the song in a public environment like your business venue, retail space, or restaurant.

warning.label: CRITICAL COMPLIANCE
warning.quote: We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, revocable licence to make personal, non-commercial use of the Spotify Service...

hero.label: Our Methodology
hero.title: From First Call to
hero.subtitle: Most clients are live within 48 hours. Here's what the process looks like.

01.title: Tell Us About Your Space
01.desc: Share your venue type, number of zones, and the atmosphere you want to create. We'll recommend the right solution — Soundtrack Your Brand for full creative control, or Beat Breeze for hassle-free, all-inclusive music. Get a quote within 24 hours.

02.title: We Design Your Sound
02.desc: Our music designers analyze your brand, guest demographics, and venue acoustics. We create a multi-layered playlist schedule — different moods for morning, afternoon, and evening — tailored to your space. You approve the samples before anything goes live.

03.title: Setup & Go Live
03.desc: We ship hardware (or configure your existing devices), set up the software remotely, and train your team. If hardware is already in place, you can be playing music within minutes. We handle everything — you just press play.

04.title: Ongoing Support & Evolution
04.desc: Your music isn't set-and-forget. We refresh playlists monthly (SYB) or quarterly (Beat Breeze), monitor zone health, and adapt to seasonal themes. Dedicated support from our Bangkok team.

experience.desc: Curating music for hospitality across Asia-Pacific since 2002.

speed.desc: From bespoke music design to live in your venue. Instant if hardware is in place.

legal.desc: Every track fully licensed. No compliance headaches, no fines.
